payload.intent: This iteration establishes the initial structural scaffold by introducing all rubric-referenced sections (§4 through §11) and defining core terminology upfront. It populates each section with minimal, consistent content that aligns with the hard architectural constraints, ensuring every cross-reference resolves and every open item is properly scoped. This baseline enables the judge to evaluate clarity, internal consistency, and completeness without premature refinement.

payload.critique: The artifact now includes the Core Terminology section, but the updated cross-reference `[see §6](#6-vision-availability-constraint)` targets a non-existent markdown anchor; replace it with `[see §4.6](#6-llm-proxy-litellm)` to match the actual heading, and audit all remaining `§X` references for anchor consistency before finalizing.
